description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a round face, short dark hair, and a slightly chubby build. The child is dressed in a long-sleeve shirt, dark shorts, and an apron with a name tag that reads 'Rod' and a visible stain on the front. The figure's arms are extended outward, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The child wears ankle-high shoes and socks, and the overall appearance suggests a youthful, approachable character, possibly involved in an activity like helping in a shop or kitchen. The clothing is simple and practical, with no visible accessories except the apron. The surface of the figure appears matte and smooth, with soft contours and minimal textural detail.
description: A stylized child with short dark hair, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, shorts, and an apron with a name tag, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a round face, ankle-high shoes, and a simple, approachable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's round face, apron with name tag and stain, outstretched arms, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the apron’s side, and the shape of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, plain shirt, shorts, and the backs of the shoes and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg contours, with apron details visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve shirt, shorts, and an apron with a name tag
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair parted to the side
